creator: levi@teklife.info
text:
I ran 'freebsd-update upgrade -r 7.3-RELEASE', and went through some y/n
questions, hit y.

I ran 'freebsd-update install', 'Installing updates...'

I ran 'shutdown -r now', rebooted

I ran 'freebsd-update install', 'Installing updates...'

It works just fine now. Thank you.

*Issue Resolved*
